div.p: The First Committee of the United Nations General Assembly met on January 18 from 3 to 5:50 p. m.; for the record, see United Nations document A/C.1/SR.426. Mr. Austin, speaking at the opening of the session, outlined for the United Nations a course of action along the lines of the passage quoted by Mr. Acheson to Ambassador Franks in the memorandum of conversation, supra; he did not, however, introduce a draft resolution.
